description_long: This object is a compact shotgun with a short barrel and a wooden pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use. The receiver and barrel are finished in matte black, while the fore-end and grip are made of dark-stained wood, providing a classic yet utilitarian appearance. The shotgun features a pump-action mechanism, with a prominent wooden pump handle located beneath the barrel. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized, enclosing a single trigger. The barrel is single and unvented, with no visible ribbing or additional attachments. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a matte black barrel and receiver, paired with dark wood grip and pump handle. Its short, single barrel and pistol grip make it ideal for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden grip, pump handle, and matte black barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle opening and the width of the barrel and pump handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the grip and pump handle still clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden grip and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no ribbing or venting, short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
